name: expose-run-report-process-metrics
description: TRIGGER CONDITIONS: Adding new metric fields to per-run report.json or report.md in scylla/e2e/run_report.py. Use when: (1) a new metrics block already exists in run_result.json and needs to appear in the human-readable report.md, (2) save_run_report_json() needs a new key with NaN-guarded float values, (3) stage_write_report() needs to read additional data from disk and thread it into the report functions.
